personas.name: Emily
personas.description: Seeking emotional support and guidance for managing negative emotions
goals: To find effective ways to manage and process negative emotions
To feel supported and understood in times of emotional distress
To develop coping strategies for dealing with challenging situations
pain_points: Struggling to cope with negative thoughts and emotions
Feeling isolated and lacking emotional support
Difficulty finding helpful resources for emotional wellbeing
context: Seeking support for mental health and wellbeing
Looking for a safe and non-judgmental space to express emotions
constraints: Limited access to in-person support services
Time constraints for engaging with support resources

personas.name: Frustrated Tech User
personas.description: A user who struggles with app usability and technical issues, impacting their mental wellbeing journey
goals: Easily access and use mental wellbeing resources
Have a smooth and efficient app experience
pain_points: Lack of personalized and human-like interaction
context: Seeking mental wellbeing support through mobile apps
Experiencing technical difficulties that hinder progress
Valuing ease of use and accessibility
constraints: Limited patience for complicated or slow apps

personas.name: Frugal Mind
personas.description: A mental wellbeing app user concerned about costs
goals: To find affordable mental health support
To explore free or low-cost therapy options
pain_points: High subscription costs for mental wellbeing apps
constraints: Limited budget for mental health expenses
Willingness to commit to subscription-based models
Prior experience with costly mental health services

personas.name: Emma
personas.description: Seeking effective mental wellbeing support through digital tools
goals: Find reliable and helpful mental health support
Learn effective coping mechanisms for mental wellness
Improve overall mental health and wellbeing
pain_points: Struggling to find the right resources for mental health support
Difficulty in managing mental health issues without proper guidance
Limited access to professional therapy or support
context: Actively seeking digital solutions for mental health support
Interested in exploring various therapeutic approaches
Values convenience and accessibility in mental health resources
constraints: Limited time to dedicate to mental health support
May have limited technical expertise with digital health tools
Prioritizes confidentiality and anonymity in mental health support

personas.name: Frustrated Achiever
personas.description: A user seeking mental wellbeing support, frustrated with app experiences
goals: Find an effective mental wellbeing app
Get support for anxiety and stress
Improve mental health through app guidance
pain_points: Frustrating user experiences with current apps
Difficulty finding relevant support or guidance
Lack of effective communication with app support
context: Seeking support for anxiety and stress
Willing to try new apps for mental wellbeing
constraints: Limited time to engage with app
Frustrated with repetitive or unhelpful interactions
